title: Advanced Loot Info
description: EMI/JEI/REI plugin for displaying advanced information about loot tables and villager trades
body:
Advanced Loot Info provides new way for displaying information about loot tables. All informations are shown in clear way.

![Advanced Loot Info tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PEPVViac/images/7bde0c7d5728dec2576f80aa6bd29d280a902db0.png)
![Advanced Loot Info preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PEPVViac/images/14fca00909ecd699b1566461c3bd94972fb38320.png)

This is not standalone mod, but requires one of three supported recipe viewers:
- Just Enough Items (JEI)
- EMI
- Roughly Enough Items (REI)

Supported mods out of box:
- LootJS

Mod also supports plugins for:
- Displaying custom Loot Entries
- Displaying custom Loot Conditions
- Displaying custom Loot Functions
- Working with custom Number Providers
- Creating custom categories (Right now only from Gameplay loot category)

All bugs report on [GitHub](https://github.com/yanny7/AdvancedLootInfo/issues).

[Discord](https://discord.gg/HauMDpbkNN).
